case_title: JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION VS. CHRIS WESTALL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK: V. MU IN ROOM 103)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT WESTALL, CHRIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-15-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTALL, CHRIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTALL, CHRIS THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE A CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT BUT INSTEAD HAD A CONTRACT WITH AURORA WINDOWS. AS PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED A JUDGMENT AGAINST AURORA WINDOWS FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF THIS LAWSUIT (SEE SAN MATEO COUNTY SMALL CLAIMS COURT NO. 120178), AN AWARD IN THIS ACTION WOULD CONSTITUTE A DOUBLE RECOVERY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT WESTALL, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT WESTALL, CHRIS ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY JW QUALITY CONSTRUCTION WESTALL, CHRIS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
